originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.

     (= CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 true))

(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  true)

reasoning: I2C=F → i2c_master_send not declared. Both da7210_init() (SOC_DA7210=T) and ak4642_init() (SOC_AK4642=T) reference it → compile errors. Non-compilable. Classification: FALSE.
